Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 39 

PLAN_CNTRCT_REC_ID 

LABEL: Plan Contract ID 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the unique Part D contract identifier for the beneficiary’s Part D plan of record for the 
year. CMS assigns an identifier to each contract that a Part D plan has with CMS. 

If the beneficiary was enrolled in more than one plan during the year, this is the contract number for
